h1: Iron & Steel Scrap Buyers in Hyderabad

faqs.q: What price do you pay for iron scrap in Hyderabad?
faqs.a: We currently pay ₹24–28 per kg for iron and steel scrap in Hyderabad, based on the daily market rate. Rate is confirmed at time of pickup after digital weighing.

faqs.q: Do you buy old steel furniture?
faqs.a: Yes. We buy all types of steel furniture including almirahs, shelves, chairs, and beds at full market rate.

faqs.q: Can you pick up heavy iron items?
faqs.a: Our team is equipped to lift and transport heavy iron and structural steel. We bring a full crew and proper equipment for large items.

faqs.q: What is the current aluminium scrap rate in Hyderabad?
faqs.a: Current aluminium scrap rate is ₹95–110 per kg in Hyderabad. Rate varies slightly by grade and purity.

faqs.q: Do you buy old aluminium windows and doors?
faqs.a: Yes, we buy all aluminium fabrication — windows, door frames, partition sections, and profiles at full market rate.

title: Copper Scrap

metaDesc: Sell copper scrap in Hyderabad at the highest market rates. Wire, pipes, motor windings, fittings — all grades accepted. Free pickup, instant cash. Call Scrapwala.

faqs.q: What is the copper scrap rate in Hyderabad today?
faqs.a: Current copper scrap rate is ₹420–480 per kg depending on grade. Bare bright copper fetches the highest price.

faqs.q: Do you accept burnt or insulated copper wire?
faqs.a: Yes. We accept bare, insulated, and burnt copper wire, though rates vary by grade. Our team assesses on-site.

faqs.q: What's the best way to sell large copper quantities?
faqs.a: Call us directly for bulk copper — we send a senior valuation team and often provide same-day cash payment for large lots.

title: E-Waste Recycling
tagline: Certified e-waste disposal for laptops, mobiles, ACs, TVs, and all electronics — with a digital receipt.
metaTitle: E-Waste Recycling in Hyderabad — Certified Disposal + Cash | Scrapwala
metaDesc: Responsible e-waste recycling in Hyderabad. Old laptops, ACs, refrigerators, mobiles — disposed with certified documentation. Cash paid. Free pickup. Call Scrapwala.

faqs.q: Do I get paid for e-waste or do I have to pay?
faqs.a: We pay you for your e-waste. Working electronics fetch higher rates; non-working items still have value as scrap. Free pickup included.

faqs.q: Is your e-waste disposal certified?
faqs.a: Yes. We work with authorized e-waste recyclers and provide a digital disposal certificate upon request — useful for corporate compliance.

faqs.q: Can you pick up an old AC or refrigerator?
faqs.a: Yes, we handle all large appliances. Our team disassembles, lifts, and transports — you pay nothing for the service.

h1: Paper & Newspaper Scrap Buyers in Hyderabad

faqs.q: What is the newspaper rate in Hyderabad today?
faqs.a: Current newspaper scrap rate is ₹8–12 per kg. Cardboard boxes are ₹5–8 per kg. White office paper fetches up to ₹12 per kg.

faqs.q: Can you shred confidential documents?
faqs.a: Yes. We offer on-site shredding for sensitive office documents. This is compliant with standard data disposal requirements.

faqs.q: Is there a minimum quantity for paper scrap pickup?
faqs.a: No minimum. A single bundle of newspapers qualifies for a free pickup. Most customers have 20–100 kg during a typical clearout.

title: Vehicle Scrap
tagline: Old cars, motorcycles, and auto-rickshaws — we handle RTO paperwork, towing, and instant payment.
metaTitle: Vehicle Scrap Buyers in Hyderabad — Old Cars, Bikes | Scrapwala
metaDesc: Sell old vehicles for scrap in Hyderabad. Cars, bikes, autos — best price, free towing, RTO paperwork handled. Scrapwala gives you the highest vehicle scrap value.

faqs.q: How is vehicle scrap value calculated?
faqs.a: Vehicle scrap value depends on weight of iron/steel, condition, make, and model. We provide an on-site evaluation with a transparent breakdown.

faqs.q: Do you help with RTO cancellation paperwork?
faqs.a: Yes. We guide you through the de-registration process. For most vehicles, our team handles the documentation end-to-end.

faqs.q: Do you provide towing for non-running vehicles?
faqs.a: Yes. Free towing is included for all vehicle scrap pickups within Hyderabad limits.
